descriptions.magnetic_declination: Angle between True North and Magnetic North
descriptions.grid_convergence: Angle between True North and Grid North (UTM projection)
descriptions.total_correction: Correction needed to convert from Magnetic bearing to Grid bearing

formulas.grid_bearing: Grid Bearing = Magnetic Bearing - Magnetic Declination + Grid Convergence
formulas.simplified: Grid Bearing = Magnetic Bearing + Total Correction

note: Magnetic declination calculated using World Magnetic Model (WMM) via geomagnetism library. Grid convergence based on UTM projection. For precise navigation, consult official sources.
